jobs.description:
We are looking for talented, driven and experienced individual for the Amazon fresh and Amazon Now program team in core consumables.

Amazon Now is Amazon's Quick Commerce program, while Amazon Fresh is Amazon's lead basket grocery program.

The program is highly cross functional in nature and requires a number of India first solutions to be created.

It is an important role that will contribute to success of the business by enabling management of critical workstreams through planning, reporting, and review mechanisms
Joining the team means partnering with a dynamic and creative group who set a high bar for innovation and success in a fast-paced and changing environment.



Key job responsibilities
Key job responsibilities
- Manage various business critical workstreams
- Own Pricing, Promotions and Selection across both Amazon Now and Amazon Fresh.
- Gain in-depth knowledge of how the business operates and effectively convert program objectives into plan.
- Own and publish various key updates and reports
- Manage multiple stakeholders to support the execution of program plan

jobs.description:
In EU, we continue to observe an unprecedented wave of legislation that impacts Selling Partner (SP) experience, constrains selection and jeopardizes growth. This increases the complexity and cost of selling in EU and makes compliance the primary barrier to SP launches in the region.

As a Derisking Manager in EU3P Compliance programs - you execute plans to scale tax or trade compliance program across EU and UK. You will partner with organizations to (1) define the seller experience to increase compliance, (2) shape the risk appetite for executive leadership, (3) implement the seller enforcement and regain strategy for EU and UK marketplaces, and (4) implement and drive simplification initiatives

The ideal candidate is motivated and agile, with strong project management skills. This opportunity requires excellent troubleshooting, stakeholder management and communication skills.

Key job responsibilities
- execute the seller experience plan together with product management
- shape the risk appetite for executive leadership,
- implement the seller enforcement and regain strategy for EU and UK marketplaces including reporting mechanisms,
- implement and drive simplification initiatives based on customer or team feedback

About the team
EU 3P Compliance is a business team that works at the intersection of
1) sellers - helping them to comply with requirements
2) amazon - reducing financial exposure and risks that we are facing
3) authorities - partnering to support their needs in a business friendly way

jobs.description:
Are you excited to drive high-visibility, strategic logistics and technology solutions to help streamline Amazon's supply chain operations in India? Amazon India Supply Chain is looking for a Senior Leader with a strong delivery record and senior leadership experience to own and execute strategic, cross-functional operations and technology projects. This role is responsible for leading teams to optimize supply and demand, develop business analytics to drive resourcing decisions, and drive cost out of the system while delivering on customer experience.
This role will be responsible for leading cross functional teams to develop, implement and drive innovative supply chain models to delight the customers in the unique Indian context.
As a core function to Amazon Fulfillment, this role requires working across various functional stakeholders to develop – Think Big ideas, work on existing processes, along with scaling the network as well as deliver results on key metrics. This role requires working with business teams across the company to define requirements and high-level process/system solutions; leading cross-functional business and development teams and managing the timelines for all software and field operations teams to support project launches.
This position involves regular communication with senior management on status, risks and change control. Cross-team coordination, project management and executive presentation skills are essential.
Key job responsibilities
· Influencing without authority: Innovative leader with the ability to identify opportunities and influence stakeholders across functions to gain support and overcome resistance with data and persuasion
· Building and Developing a strong team: Significant experience leading teams, developing your directs to consistently deliver valuable projects and performance on core metrics
· Strong Communication: Ability to communicate expectations and requirements equally well with business and technology teams at all levels, and capacity to write well-reasoned and data-driven proposals, performing your own data analysis as necessary
· Problem Solving: Demonstrate exceptional problem-solving skills, to structure ambiguous situations and to use data analysis to the extent possible to find and drive solutions
· Delivering Results: Ability to successfully deliver end-to-end complex technology and operations projects under tight timelines, working through the multiple constraints along the way
Key job responsibilities

A day in the life


• Reviewing daily network performance dashboards and deep-diving into anomalies.
• Leading cross-functional stand-up meetings to address immediate operational challenges.
• Collaborating with operations teams to resolve network constraints and optimize resource allocation.
• Developing long-term network optimization strategies and presenting them to leadership.
• Coordinating with tech teams to implement system enhancements that support network efficiency.
• Analyzing large datasets to identify trends and opportunities for improvement.
• Conducting stakeholder meetings to align on project goals and timelines.

jobs.description:
The Regulatory Intelligence, Safety and Compliance (RISC) team's charter is to protect Amazon customers from products that are illegal, illegally marketed, unsafe, or otherwise prohibited by Amazon policies. The Product Safety policy lead will own analysis and risk assessment activities required to formulate WW product safety polices. They will serve as our go-to subject matter expert for difficult questions regarding the optimal policies required to make scalable decisions related to product safety in product categories including but not limited to: electronics, batteries, and electrical products.

Key job responsibilities
• Responsible for conducting product safety risk assessments across a broad range of electrical products
• Make high-judgement decisions regarding policies related to product safety in order to meet WW regulatory obligations and enhance customer safety
• Perform analysis of data from a variety of sources to identify possible risk indicators to support policy decisions
• Coordinate with Legal teams to integrate legal and safety analysis in support of key policy decisions
• Work with a wide range of cross-functional teams to communicate Amazon's safety and compliance strategies to stakeholders
• Communicate regularly with leadership and ensure consistent reporting against commitments
• Drafting and presenting strategies to enhance risk management practices, including analysis of industry practice
Internal job description

jobs.description:
As a Senior Product Manager on the Lifecycle Experiences team, you will own the product vision and execution roadmap for our Progression Intelligence charter. This charter sits at the intersection of machine learning, real-time decisioning, and customer lifecycle strategy - and is responsible for determining which customers to engage, with what action, at what moment, and through which channel.

You will lead the technical integration of our rewards optimization, causal measurement, and action intelligence systems onto a unified agentic orchestration platform - enabling faster experimentation, more personalized interventions, and greater operational efficiency across all our emerging locales.

This is a deeply technical role that requires equal comfort with ML systems, API architecture, and product strategy. You will work closely with applied scientists, software engineers, and marketing stakeholders to ship systems that directly delight millions of customers.

Key job responsibilities
- Own the multi-year product roadmap for Progression Intelligence, including the phased migration of core ML models and decisioning systems onto a unified orchestration platform
- Define technical requirements and integration specifications for connecting rewards optimization, propensity modeling, causal incrementality measurement, and promotion configuration systems into a cohesive, real-time decisioning layer
- Partner with applied scientists to translate model outputs into actionable product features - including reward denomination optimization, next-best-action recommendations, and personalized campaign triggers
- Drive quarterly planning and prioritization across a portfolio of integrations, balancing technical debt, engineering capacity, and business impact
- Define and own success metrics for the Progression Intelligence platform - including model coverage, decisioning latency, incremental lift, and customer settlement outcomes
- Write product requirement documents and participate in technical design reviews, and lead alignment across engineering, science, and business stakeholders
- Represent the Progression Intelligence charter in senior leadership reviews, including weekly business reviews and annual planning cycles
- Identify and resolve technical dependencies and cross-team blockers to keep the integration roadmap on track

About the team
The Lifecycle Experiences team is on a mission to deepen customer engagement across Amazon's fastest-growing marketplaces. We own the end-to-end customer lifecycle - from first purchase to habitual shopping - across India, Mexico, Brazil, Turkey, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Australia, Singapore, and South Africa. Our north star is moving customers from occasional buyers to loyal, high-frequency shoppers.

We build and scale programs including Gamified Experiences, Rewards, Promotions Orchestration, and Personalization - reaching millions of customers across our fast growing marketplaces. We operate at the intersection of product, marketing, and data science, and we move fast.
